caption: A grid of video conference participants shows several individuals in a virtual meeting. The participants include a man in a dark jacket and glasses, a man in a black shirt, a woman with headphones, a woman in a light-colored top, a woman in a blue-and-white striped shirt, a man in a grey jacket and glasses, a man in a white button-down shirt outdoors in front of a brick building, and a man with a beard in a dark sweater. Throughout the sequence, the participants remain in their respective tiles, maintaining steady gazes toward their cameras. In one instance, a man in a dark shirt is seen holding a clear glass to his mouth. Small, white timecodes appear in the bottom right corners of some frames, such as "00:01:12.31" and "00:01:11.31". The background settings vary from indoor home offices and rooms with bookshelves to outdoor environments.
